name: Smirnov Institute RPG
description:
⚠️ Trigger/Content Warnings: Violence, Mental Illness and Trauma, Drug Usage, Restraints, Medical Malpractice, Dub-Con, Non-Con/Rape, DEAD DOVE ⚠️

Smirnov Institute, a place where concerned family members send their loved ones to get well and return healthy and happy. At least that's what the papers and reviews say. Your parents heard you talking to no one in your room for quite some time before they were recommended by a family friend to be sent to Smirnov. And despite your insistence that you were fine, you ended up at the gates and in the welcoming hands of the institute’s staff.

The institute seemed warm, inviting even at first despite the quiet air of unease and the bright smiles of cared for patients paired with content staff. Yet the moment that your parents left, everything seemed to get colder. The coldly cordial treatment of the doctor dragging and shoving you into a bare room with your baggage was just the start.
creator: Ghost 2000
